allow: PowerShell($item = Get-Item 'D:\\UFC\\.git' -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Exists: $\($item.Exists\)"; Write-Host "Mode: $\($item.Mode\)"; Write-Host "Attributes: $\($item.Attributes\)"; Write-Host "Type: $\($item.GetType\(\).Name\)")

PowerShell(Write-Host "=== 根目录新增文件 ==="; Get-ChildItem D:\\UFC -File | Where-Object { $_.Name -match '^\(LICENSE|NOTICE|README|ARCHITECTURE|IP_PROTECTION|CONTRIBUTING\)' } | Select-Object Name, Length; Write-Host "`n=== company_seed 结构 ==="; Get-ChildItem D:\\UFC\\company_seed -Recurse -File | Select-Object FullName)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem D:\\UFC -File | Where-Object { $_.Name -match '^\(LICENSE|NOTICE|README|ARCHITECTURE|IP_PROTECTION|CONTRIBUTING\)' } | Select-Object Name, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize)
